query:
ALTER TABLE research 
CHANGE COLUMN file_url fileUrl VARCHAR(500),
CHANGE COLUMN file_type fileType VARCHAR(50),
CHANGE COLUMN file_name fileName VARCHAR(255),
CHANGE COLUMN created_at createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;
